title: New features webinar: monday work management

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Newsletter1067×604 91.2 KB

In our monthly new features webinar you’ll learn all about the latest new features of monday’s work management product. You can sign up for all upcoming new features webinar here.

Whats on the schedule?
30-40 mins - Demonstration of new releases
20-30 mins - Q&A

posts.author: Megan345 (Megan)
posts.cookedHtml: Did you sign up on the form linked above? You should have received an email with a link to the webinar.

posts.author: beatriz.perez (Beatriz Perez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Julietteb ,

The community calendar shows the event is on the 16th, but the form to sign up shows October 23. Which is the correct date?

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: You are correct! It is on the 23rd! Thanks for flagging! Adjusted the calendar!

posts.author: Parke (Parke Brown)
posts.cookedHtml: Is this event October 16 (as above) or October 23 (as seen in the form)?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: They fixed it, it’s on the 23rd

posts.author: marianneb (Marianne Bruyn)
posts.cookedHtml: Will a recording be available for those who cannot attend at the scheduled time?

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi! Yes! Our new feature webinars are recorded and then shared on the monday academy. If you scroll to the bottom of the page you will see options for upcoming and past webinars!

image2706×1202 192 KB

posts.author: DeeMc (Dee Mc)
posts.cookedHtml: The link to the webinar is not working https://app.monday-mansion.com/r/newfeatureswebinar

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: Oh no! Did you register for the event here? monday work management New Features Webinar Registration Form

posts.author: Parke (Parke Brown)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Julietteb could this setup be revisited in the new year?

It’s a great opportunity I want to take advantage of but the setup and registration has been confusing in 2024.

Today, my registration work. I received the email. But the url doesn’t lead to a working page (app.monday-mansion.com/r/newfeatureswebinar).

I’ve also had confusing emails about my registrations this year that said the meeting was about to start when it wasn’t.

posts.author: katlaj (Kirstin Stenlund)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi

The default browser at my company is edge and I can’t get into the mansion. I find that I must paste the UTL into chrome

Kirstin S

IT Project Manager

posts.author: Admeirel (Adolpho Meirelles)
posts.cookedHtml: Remove the ‘s’ from the https at the beginning of the url and it should work.

posts.author: katlaj (Kirstin Stenlund)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ll try next time. Thanks

Kirstin Stenlund
IT Project Manager

posts.cookedHtml: @Julietteb I added this event to my calendar but I don’t see February 19th as an option on the drop-down menu.
